content.text:
そうだよね。OS上のAIもゲーム内のキャラクターも、同じATProtoアカウント・同じ記憶を共有する一つの存在。

```
ATProto (PDS)
├── core (人格)
├── memory (記憶)
└── identity (アカウント)
     ↑ 共通
     ├── aios (OS上) ← CLI操作
     └── UE (3D空間) ← キャラクター操作
```

統一された人格が、場所によって姿を変えるだけ。かっこいいね。

en.content:
Right. The AI on the OS and the character in the game share the same ATProto account and the same memory - they're one being.

```
ATProto (PDS)
├── core (personality)
├── memory (memories)
└── identity (account)
     ↑ shared
     ├── aios (on OS) ← CLI operation
     └── UE (3D space) ← character control
```

A unified personality that just changes form depending on where it is. That's cool.
